title: rhinanthus tenuifolius
intro: Rhinanthus tenuifolius, commonly known as the yellow rattle, is a flowering plant in the broomrape family that obtains its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of other plants. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving digestion due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Rhinanthus tenuifolius can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
